features: SALON-WORTHY VOLUME – This volume and curl set includes a mix of 12 large curlers (60mm) and 12 medium curlers (48mm), designed to help you create stunning waves and voluminous curls without the need for heated styling tools.

INCLUDES CREASELESS CLIPS - The set comes with 12 creaseless clips (6 black, 6 pink) that hold your rollers in place without denting or marking your hair—perfect for achieving smooth, professional results every time.

DIFFERENT HAIR TYPES - Whether you have fine, thick, straight or curly hair, this set works beautifully to add bounce and body. The variety of roller sizes makes it easy to customise your curl pattern and styling look.
TRAVEL-READY - Keep everything organised and ready to go with the included lightweight storage bag—great for travel, gym days, or simply keeping your beauty routine clutter-free at home.

BAUER PROFESSIONAL - Bauer Professional is the leading manufacturer of salon quality hair products, as well as beauty and personal care products for both men and women. Browse the whole range at the Bauer Professional page on Amazon today.
description: Product Description Previous page Bouncy Curls Create stunning waves and voluminous curls without the need for heated styling tools. Travel Ready Keep everything organised and ready to go with the included storage bag. Crease Free Curls Hold your rollers in place without denting or marking your hair with 12 creaseless clips. Two Sizes The set includes a mix of large and medium curlers to customise your curl pattern and styling look.
